mentals.text: MIND. ► Emotional. ► Great excitement after two glasses of beer, which was not relished; in the open air it seemed as though the pulses beat more violently than usual, with general sensation of heat; this lasted an hour, and gradually disappeared while walking (in the evening, beer caused no change in his condition), [8] . ► Unusual liveliness and clearness of mind (second day), [14] . ► Became lively for the first time towards evening (second day), [14] . ► Talkative mood, [3] . ► Joyous mood, [17] . ► Depressed mood (first day), [16] . ► Anxious sensation, with uneasiness, [5] . ► Apprehensiveness, [5] . ► Apprehensiveness in the evening, [5] . [10.] ► Apprehension (first day), [14] . ► Irritable mood, [18] . ► Very irritable and out of humor, morning and evening (first day), [14] . ► Out of humor, with irritable mood (fifth day), [11] . ► Ill-humor without cause; in the evening it was followed by a lively mood, [5] . ► Fretful mood (eighth day), [16] . ► Intellectual. ► Less mental activity than usual, [12] .

head.text: HEAD. ► Confusion and Vertigo. ► Confusion of the head, [8] , [13] , [19] . ► Confusion of the head throughout the day, [5] . ► Confusion of the head the whole day (second day), [3] . [20.] ► Confusion of the head, especially on the vertex (seventh day), [15] . ► Confusion of the head, as after drinking too much, [8] . ► Confusion of the head on the vertex (third day), [15] . ► Confusion of the head, with slight vertigo in the morning, [5] . ► Confusion of the head in the forehead, with sensation of heaviness and dulness, in the morning on rising, [12] . ► Confusion of the head in the evening, [5] . ► Confusion of the head after breakfast, [5] . ► Confusion of the head, as before the outbreak of violent coryza, relieved in the open air, [13] . ► Confusion of the head in the forehead, with pain extending across the left frontal eminence, involving a small portion of the left half of the forehead, the parietal bone, and the temple, and reaching to the zygomatic portion of the right jaw, leaving a general sensation along all those parts of a dull tearing or cutting, transient (after one hour), [14] . ► Slight confusion of the head, [7] . [30.] ► Great confusion of the head (third day), [10] . ► Great confusion of the head, in the evening while walking (especially on the vertex), (seventh day), [15] . ► Great confusion of the head in the evening, with pressive pains on the vertex, with burning in the skin of the forehead, lasting into the night, [24] . ► Dizzy confusion of the head (first day), [14] . ► Dizzy confusion of the head, in the morning on waking, [9] . ► Head was confused and felt intoxicated, especially towards evening, [9] . ► Slight vertigo, [5] . ► Transient vertigo, [5] . ► Dizziness, as after intoxication, after eating (first day), [14] . ► General Head. ► Rush of blood to the head, [21] . [40.] ► Rush of blood to the head, on going into a warm room after a walk; he was obliged to leave the room, when he felt better, repeated three times in one forenoon, [8] . ► Headache, not relieved in the open air (first day), [22] . ► Headache in the morning on waking; it soon ceased, but frequently returned for a short time through the day (sixth day), [22] . ► Headache, with such great weakness that she was obliged to sit down frequently during a hurried walk (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Headache, consisting of fulness, with increased warmth and slight stupefaction (second day), [14] . ► Sensation of swelling of the head, [5] . ► Dull pain in the whole head all the forenoon, aggravated by violent motion of it, [8] . ► Pressive pain in the brain, especially at the bridge of the nose, [8] . ► Pressive headache, like that frequently experienced with disordered stomach, [13] . ► Pressive headache, as after drinking too much, in the morning after waking, disappearing after rising, [8] . [50.] ► Pressive headache in the evening (third day), [22] . ► Pressive headache, aggravated by stepping hard (first day), [10] . ► Painful stitches shoot through the brain, [24] . ► His accustomed beer caused headache (second day), [10] . ► The headache and chest symptoms were somewhat relieved after lying down, for some hours in the forenoon (fourth day), [10] . ► Forehead. ► Indefinite pain in the forehead, aggravated by shaking or turning the head, or even moving it, [9] . ► Dull headache above the right eye, in the morning on waking, [6] . ► Dull, burrowing, frontal headache, [2] . ► Pressive pain in the right side of the forehead, sometimes extending to the occiput (first day), [2] . ► Dull pressive pain in the forehead (first day), [14] . [60.] ► Pressive frontal headache at breakfast, which was eaten without remarkable appetite (fourteenth day), [11] . ► Tearings in the frontal bone, [30] . ► Tearing pain, extending from the felt eye up into the forehead, in the evening after lying down, [9] . ► Temples. ► Violent raging pain, extending from the right eye along the squamous portion of the temporal bone, on its inner side to the occiput; it seems a though a fluid were injected paroxysmally into a small blood-vessel, [8] . ► Sensation as if the temples were too narrow, [12] . ► Pressure in both temples, [5] . ► Pressive pain in the right temple, [1] . ► Pressive pain in the left temporal region soon after rising, which frequently extended to the left eye, and lasted nearly the whole day, [23] . ► Slight pressive pain, extending from the temples towards the vertex, which completely disappeared after the customary washing with cold water (second day), [11] . ► Sticking pain in both temples, with painful sensation of fulness of the whole head (3d trit.), [4] . [70.] ► Dull sticking pain in the left temporal region, lasting several minutes, disappearing on pressure, but returning on leaving off the pressure (seventh day), [16] . ► Violent throbbing and pressive pains in both temples, lasting more than an hour, equally during rest and motion, frequently alternating with heat and redness of the face (second day), [20] . ► Vertex. ► A painful elevation on the vertex as large as a pea, lasting the whole day, [24] . ► Severe pressure and burning pain in the vertex, in the morning on waking, lasting an hour, but on rising after a short subsequent sleep it disappeared, [24] . ► Sensitiveness of the head on the vertex, [24] . ► Parietals. ► Dull burrowing headache in the posterior portion of the right parietal bone, paroxysmal, continuing only a short time, while lying in bed in the morning (one hour after 25 drops), [6] . ► Rather severe sticking in the head, in the coronal suture of the right side, [24] . ► Occiput. ► Sensation as though a hot constricting band extended from one mastoid process across the occiput to the other; this region seemed tense and constricted; the condition became worse, until at last it affected the whole skull, in which the pain seemed to fix itself, and it seemed as though the bones became drawn closer and closer together, also involving the whole scalp (in which the pain appeared to be seated), and which seemed to be drawn tighter and tighter about the skull (second day), [14] . ► Dull boring pain in the left side of the occiput towards the ear, [6] . ► Indefinite drawing and pressing in the occiput, temples, and right eye, [1] . [80.] ► Pressure and sensation of warmth in the occiput, at 6 P.M. in a warm room, [8] . ► Pressing pain in the occiput, with sensation as if the scalp were swollen; this sensation extended to the left cheek and side of the nose, [1] . ► External Head. ► Gooseflesh at the roots of the hairs and bristling of the hair (second day), [14] . ► Sensation as if the scalp were drawn tightly over the skull (after one hour), [14] . ► Stitches in the occiput like the bite of a leech woke him from sleep and caused scratching, [6] . ► Crawling pain in the scalp on walking, which obliges him to scratch (eleventh day), [11] . EYE. ► Pressure upon the left eye, especially at the inner canthus, [8] . ► Brow and Orbit. ► Frequent pressive pain in the superciliary ridges during the whole proving, [20] . ► Pressive pain in the orbits, [21] . ► Lids. ► Slight agglutination of the eyes, [24] . [90.] ► Frequent twitching-like jerking in the left lower eyelid, [6] . ► Slight burning in the margins of the lids, [24] . ► Feeling as though the margins of the lids were swollen, [23] . ► Lachrymal Apparatus. ► Increased lachrymation, especially in the open air, so that the eyes were constantly swimming in tears of a thicker consistence than natural, [20] . ► Conjunctiva. ► Inflammation of the conjunctiva of the eyes, to which he was subject, [12] . ► Conjunctiva of the right eye inflamed, [12] . ► Ball. ► Sensation as of a foreign body in the eyes between the lids and balls, [23] . ► Pressure in the left eyeball, [23] . ► Frequent smarting pain between the left eye and lid, as though a hair were between them, [6] . ► Smarting-biting between the eyeballs and lids, as if a hair were between them, on waking in the morning, obliging him to rub them, [6] . ► Vision. [100.] ► Sight much weaker than usual, [12] . EAR. ► External. ► Constant pressive-tensive pain in the left mastoid process, [6] . ► Drawing pain on the convex surface of the left concha, especially severe on touch, [7] . ► Violent biting-sticking in the left antitragus, [6] . ► A pressive sticking pain above and behind the left ear, increased to a painful burrowing congestion, that only seldom remitted, and when worst extended not only to the left side of the neck and clavicular region, but also to the last back teeth of the left lower jaw and the left side of the occiput, [7] . ► Drawing-tearing pain upon and behind the left ear, followed by constant roaring in it, [6] . ► Severe and deep stitches in front of the left ear, between the antitragus and zygoma, [7] . ► Frequent biting stitches in the left antitragus, [7] . ► Violent, pressive, throbbing pain in the left mastoid process, which at times increases to a burrowing from within outward, when warm in bed before midnight; when most severe it extends into the left ear, in the left occipital region, the last back teeth of the lower jaw, and along the sterno-cleido-mastoid muscle to the left claviculo-pectoral region; on touch the parts pain as if suppurating, [7] . ► Pain in the region of the right parotid gland, followed by a similar pain in the submaxillary gland under the tongue, with constant accumulation of saliva in the mouth, [6] . ► Internal. [110.] ► Stoppage of both ears, with sensation of pressure in the meatus auditorius (sixth day), [20] . ► Sensation as if the external auditory passages were closed, with crackling in the right ear (aggravation of the usual roaring in the ear), [12] . ► Feeling as though the left ear were stopped, or the hearing impeded, with tensive-pressive pain in the left mastoid process, extending to the clavicular region of the left side and to the last back teeth of the lower jaw; aggravated by lying upon the ear, lasting the whole day, with short intervals, [7] . ► Pressive pain in the right Eustachian tube, aggravated by turning the head to the right side and on swallowing; this occurred suddenly an hour before dinner, and suddenly and completely disappeared after warm soup (seventh day), [2] . ► Drawings in the right ear, and also at times in the left, [23] . ► Drawing in the right meatus auditorius, lasting the whole evening, [23] . ► Frequent painful drawing within the right ear, [6] . ► Painful cramplike drawing within the right ear, [6] . ► A drawing pain within the right ear, which at times became sticking, with great roaring in the left ear, [7] . ► Severe stitches in the left ear, [5] . [120.] ► Violent stitches within the right ear, followed by aching in the back teeth of the right upper jaw, [6] . ► Biting stitch in the right meatus auditorius, and in the right temporal region, [6] . ► Transient drawing-twinging pain within the left ear, [6] . ► Throbbing pain within the left ear synchronous with the pulse, [7] . ► Rhythmical throbbing in the ear upon which he was lying (first day), [14] . ► Tickling and itching in the left meatus auditorius, frequently repeated through the day, and afterwards becoming a pressure in the concha (third day), [20] . ► Tickling and voluptuous itching in both ears, from the external canal through the inner ear to the mouth, lasting only fifteen or twenty seconds, [6] . ► Itching in the right external meatus auditorius, obliging him to bore in with the finger, [7] . ► Itching and roaring in the left ear, [6] . ► Much itching within the left ear, [7] . [130.] ► Severe itching and roaring in the left ear, [7] . ► Itching within the ear is especially noticed on going from the cold air into the warm room, [7] . ► Hearing. ► Impaired hearing, [24] . ► Difficulty in hearing, as if the ears were stopped with cotton, [5] . ► The left ear seems stopped, so that he hears less distinctly than usual, [7] . ► Cracking in the left ear on empty swallowing, [7] . ► Cracking in the left ear and a sensation as though earwax would flow from it, on swallowing saliva, [7] . ► Loud ringing within the left ear, with bruised pain about the outer left ear, especially in the mastoid process; the pain extends down the left side of the neck to the clavicular and pectoral regions, [6] . ► Great roaring in the ears, as from a storm in a forest, [6] . ► Extremely troublesome roaring in the left ear, [7] . [140.] ► Seething-roaring in the left ear, [6] , [7] .

nose.text: NOSE. ► Objective. ► Redness of the nostrils, with sensitive soreness in them (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Crusts from on the outer margins of the nostrils, [5] . ► A yellowish pulverulent substance on the margin of the nostril, [24] . ► Sneezing, with cough and expectoration, [5] . ► Violent sneezing, [21] . ► Violent repeated sneezing in the morning, with discharge of mucus from both nostrils, [13] . ► Frequent sneezing, [5] , [13] . ► Frequent sneezing, several times in succession, [24] . ► Frequent sneezing in the evening, [23] . [150.] ► Frequent sneezing, with dry cough, [5] . ► Very violent paroxysms of sneezing, with burning in the mucous membrane of the nose and on the margins of the wings, as from pepper; these attacks of sneezing occurred nearly every half hour, but the burning of the nose was quite constant (third day), [14] . ► Secretion of much mucus in the nose (third day), [10] , [24] . ► Secretion of much mucus in the nose, without the usual catarrhal symptoms, [24] . ► Very great secretion of mucus in the nose, [24] . ► Secretion of thin white mucus in the nose, [12] . ► Profuse discharge of thin mucus from the nose throughout the day, [5] . ► Slight coryza, with sticking pain in both temples, rawness and soreness of the throat (third day after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Subjective. ► Nose dry, stopped, [1] . ► Dryness of the mucous membrane of the nose and throat, somewhat relieved by water, [5] . [160.] ► Dryness of the mucous membrane of the nose and throat, so that no mucus could be loosened, either by blowing the nose or hawking, [20] . ► On account of the dryness of the posterior nares he was frequently obliged to draw water through the nostrils; after the water he was able to dislodge some hard masses of mucus by blowing the nose, followed by relief for a short time, [12] . ► Pressive pain above the arch of the nose and in the frontal sinuses, [12] . ► Sensation of stoppage of the nose, with watery discharge from it (3d trit.), [4] . ► Itching in the nose, followed by frequently repeated violent sneezing (ninth day), [16] .

face.text: FACE. ► Redness of the face and hands, with distension and throbbing of the vessels (first day), [14] . ► Crawling and drawing in the left side of the face and nose, corresponding in extend to the infraorbital plexus of nerves, and resembling prosopalgia (second day), [14] . ► Cheeks. ► Crawling in the malar bones, [20] . ► Crawling, beginning in the left malar bone, extending across the back of the nose to the right cheek, repeated three times during the day (third day), [20] . ► Crawling sensation, extending from the right malar bone across the back of the nose to the left cheek, in the evening (second day), [20] . [170.] ► Sensation of heaviness in the left upper jaw, as if the teeth were pressed out of their sockets (third day), [2] . ► Lips. ► Small cracks in the lips, which seem covered with meal (eighth day), [20] . ► Sensation as though the lower lip were drawn from both sides towards the middle (frequently alternating with the pulsating beats in the heart), [9] . ► On chewing, pain in the left articulation of the lower jaw, with cracking in it when swallowing, [7] . ► Sensation of soreness in the toothless places of the lower jaw (sixth day), [20] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Coc-c.

throat.text: THROAT. ► Objective. ► Slight redness of the inner throat, without difficulty in swallowing (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Hawking of mucus, [17] . ► Hawking of mucus, with tickling in the larynx, followed by three short paroxysms of cough (third day), [16] . ► Frequent hawking of mucus, [3b] . ► Frequent easy hawking of mucus, in the afternoon (fourth day), [16] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness in the throat, [27] . ► Dryness and scraping in the throat, especially on the palate, disturbing sleep, [1] . ► Dryness of the throat awoke him several times in the night, always relieved by cold water, [5] . [260.] ► Dryness of the throat, as if it were full of dust, increasing till in the evening it was accompanied by burning in the arch of the palate, [5] . ► Extreme dryness of the throat, [8] . ► Sensation of dryness in the throat, [5] . ► Sensation of dryness in the throat, immediately after taking the drug, [23] . ► Sensation of dryness in the posterior nares, [12] . ► The throat was dry, with painful tension on the right side, when swallowing, [8] . ► Feeling as of commencing inflammation of the throat, [3b] . ► Burning in the throat and fauces like cramps, soon after taking, [14] . ► Burning in the throat, with frequent attempts to hawk (third day), [11] . ► Burning in the throat, with hawking of mucus (sixth day), [16] . [270.] ► Smoking caused an almost burning pain in the throat, [5] . ► Burning in the throat and lips while smoking, increasing so that he was obliged to stop smoking. [5] . ► Slight burning in the throat (second day), [11] . ► Excessive burning in the throat, somewhat relieved by drinking cold water (fourth day), [11] . ► Choking in the throat, with constriction commencing at the stomach and extending up into the throat, [17] . ► Pressive sensation in the throat (eighth day), [11] . ► Sensation in the throat as if a crumb were sticking behind the larynx, [8] . ► Sensation as if a hair were sticking in the throat, which caused hawking of various-colored mucus, [3] . ► Griping-sticking and constriction of the throat (fourth day), [22] . ► Sensation of soreness in the throat (after 3d trit.), [4] . [280.] ► Sensation of soreness in the throat, without difficulty on swallowing (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Scraping in the throat, with frequent expectoration of mucus, [23] . ► Scraping in the throat, [20] . ► Scraping in the throat, from morning till noon, relieved after dinner, [5] . ► Slight scraping in the throat, [24] . ► Scraping sensation in the throat, [13] . ► Scraping sensation in the throat which caused frequent paroxysms of cough, with expectoration of considerable mucus, [13] . ► Rawness and scraping in the throat, as after highly seasoned food, [21] . ► Rawness and roughness in the throat throughout the day, with a deep hoarse voice, somewhat relieved in the warmth of the bed, at night (second day), [14] . [290.] ► Sensation of rawness in the throat, compelling frequent hawking of mucus, [3b] . ► Sensation of rawness in the throat and frequent expectoration of mucus, which was easily loosened, [23] . ► Sensation of rawness in the throat, and, in consequence, a very violent paroxysm of coughing, lasting nearly half an hour, [23] . ► Unpleasant sensation of rawness in the throat, the whole day (third day), [11] . ► Tickling in the throat, [26] . ► Tickling in the throat, in the morning, not allowing him to lie in bed, causing loud violent paroxysms of cough without expectoration, although there seemed to be considerable mucus collected in the throat; only after warm drinks the mucus was loosened and expectorated in large loose masses; the irritation to cough seemed to be especially in the uvula, the soft palate, and the mucous membrane covering the posterior wall of the fauces, and was characterized by only occurring in the morning, in bed, and being loosened after breakfast (consisting of weak coffee and milk), so that throughout the forenoon there was only a slight hawking, with expectoration of loose mucus (second day), [14] . ► Tickling irritation to vomit, in the throat, in the morning, [5] . ► Sensation as if a thread were hanging down the throat, with constant hawking of mucus, [19] . ► Throat symptoms were aggravated in warmth, especially in bed , [20] . [300.] ► After the throat symptoms had lasted eleven days, I was obliged to take Lachesis as an antidote; within five minutes after the 7th dil., I experienced relief; with the paroxysms of coughing, easy expectoration of lumpy mucus, followed by relief, quiet night; swallowing was quite free; the next morning the roughness of the throat had disappeared, [20] . ► Uvula and Tonsils. ► Sensation as if the uvula were elongated, causing constant headache (sixth day), [15] . ► Swelling of the right tonsil, [12] . ► Fauces, Pharynx, and sophagus. ► Burning in the fauces, every morning, [14] . ► Irritation in the fauces, as if they were tickled with a feather, [5] . ► Dark redness of the pharynx, with difficult swallowing (ninth day), [20] . ► Dryness in the pharynx, causing cough (ninth day), [29] . ► Dryness of the pharynx, obliging him to swallow, with slight scraping (first day), [11] . ► Sensation of dryness in the posterior wall of the pharynx, [12] . ► At noon, a sensation as if a piece of ice had slipped down the pharynx (fourth day), [20] . [310.] ► Sensation as of a plug in the pharynx, [12] . ► Pressure in the pharynx, especially on empty swallowing, [24] . ► A peculiar scraping in the pharynx, with slight constriction of the throat (third day), [25] . ► Burning in the sophagus, [9] . ► Swallowing. ► Constant desire to swallow, with a sensation as of a large lump in the pharynx, and great swelling and redness of the right tonsil, [12] . ► Difficulty in swallowing, in the evening; a sensation as if the larynx were swollen, with difficult speech, [3b] . ► Unable to drink water (second day), [22] . ► Sensation on swallowing liquids, as though they were forced downward by a spasm, [9] .

stomach.text: STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Increased appetite, [27] . ► Good appetite for dinner and almost ravenous hunger for supper (second day), [10] . [320.] ► Great appetite, or rather ravenous hunger, but he had scarcely eaten a spoonful of soup when the appetite disappeared and he ate without desire, though without aversion, [13] . ► Great appetite for dinner, which, however, was eaten without relish and with speedy satiety; the food, though light and easily digested, caused discomfort and pressure in the stomach, and frequent eructations, which did not relieve; the stomach was only somewhat relieved after repeated uprisings of food, whereby portions of it were thrown off (second day), [14] . ► Appetite variable, [1] . ► Hunger at an unusual time, at 6 P.M., obliging him to eat; in spite of this frequent taking of nourishment he was not strengthened, but felt weary the whole day, and disinclined to work (second day), [14] . ► Ravenous hunger, even soon after eating (second day), [14] . ► Ravenous hunger for dinner, which, however, is very soon satisfied (tenth day), [11] . ► Sensation of hunger, even after eating (second day), [16] . ► Sensation of hunger, even after eating (second day), [15] . ► Unpleasant sensation of hunger; was obliged to eat much and often (second day), [14] . ► Satiety, soon after eating dinner, [23] . [330.] ► Sense of satiety from water, with aversion to drinking (tenth day), [22] . ► Loss of appetite, [8] ; (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Loss of appetite (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Loss of appetite, without aversion to food (twentieth day), [11] . ► Loss of appetite, with increased thirst, [5] . ► No appetite for breakfast, but afterwards ravenous hunger, [5] . ► Aversion to food and drink, [9] . ► Aversion to smoking (fourteenth day), [11] . ► Thirst. ► *Thirst , [5] . ► Thirst, especially in the morning, [1] . [340.] ► Thirst somewhat increased after eating, [12] . ► Great thirst, in the evening (tenth day), [22] . ► Great thirst, in the evening, with longing for beer, after a glass of which he experienced pains in the whole of the head, with sensation of great weakness, so that he was unable to sleep before midnight (fourteenth day), [11] . ► Great thirst after eating; a large quantity of cold water caused unusual chilliness, [5] . ► Aversion to coffee and water (third day), [22] . ► Eructation. ► Eructations and inclination to cough (first day), [25] . ► Eructations of air, [13] . ► Loud spasmodic eructations of air, every evening, [14] . ► Tasteless eructations (first and sixth days), [15] . ► Heartburn. ► Heartburn, with tensive pain in the throat, in the afternoon, [5] . [350.] ► Heartburn at night, [5] . ► Heartburn, for two hours after eating, [5] . ► Heartburn, while walking after smoking, [9] . ► Heartburn, with eructations of almost corrosive fluid, [9] . ► Severe heartburn, and pressure in the stomach, after wine, [9] . ► Nausea. ► Nausea, [9] , [19] . ► Nausea in the stomach, [18] . ► Nausea, with eructations of air, [24] . ► Nausea, with inclination to vomit, in the morning (tenth day), [22] . ► Nausea, with cramp in the stomach, and sensation of hunger, [17] . [360.] ► Nausea, especially after a violent paroxysm of coughing, which brings water to the eyes, [24] . ► Constant rising towards the stomach, causing nausea (fourth day), [22] . ► Some nausea (after 20 drops), [29] . ► Slight nausea, in the morning, after taking, [24] . ► Sensation of general nausea, in the morning on waking (second day), [14] . ► The thought of drinking causes nausea and tendency to vomit, [5] . ► Inclination to vomit, [21] . ► Inclination to vomit, caused by slight griping sensation in the throat, [5] . ► Slight inclination to vomit, relieved by some weak wine, [5] . ► Retching, [19] . [370.] ► Frequent retching, [9] . ► Excessive retching, with great nausea and accumulation of saliva, in the morning on waking (fifth day), [15] . ► Stomach. ► Distension of the stomach, [21] . ► Distension in the stomach, immediately after rising, with retching rising up to the throat, [8] . ► Flatulent distension of the stomach, after eating, [9] . ► Emptiness of the stomach, [18] . ► Sensation of emptiness in the stomach, [17] . ► The sensation of crumbs in the throat seemed to frequently descend towards the stomach, and then to rise again, lasting the whole day, [9] . ► Sensation as though a stone of the size of the first were lying in the stomach, [9] . ► Heaviness and pressure in the stomach, [9] . [380.] ► Pain in the stomach, [19] . ► Pain in the stomach, with a sensation as if a great ball were lying in it, [19] . ► Several attacks of pain in the stomach, with commencing nausea and almost vomiting, [24] . ► Indefinite slight pain in the pit of the stomach and left hypochondrium, [1] . ► Burning and pressure in the stomach, [24] . ► Stomachache and flatulence (fifth day), [15] . ► Fulness and sensation of pressure in the stomach, with pressing upward, and choking as far up as the fauces, [8] . ► Sensation as though the stomach were too full, though he had eaten nothing, and as though it would be relieved by vomiting, [9] . ► Sensation as though the stomach were swollen, after eating less than usual (first day), [22] . ► Transient pain in the stomach, like a commencing cramp, [17] . [390.] ► Cramplike aching in the stomach (first day), [14] . ► Griping and sticking in the stomach (first day), [22] . ► Slight griping, beginning in the stomach and extending to the cæcal region, at times intermitting (fifth day), [15] . ► Oppressive gnawing sensation in the stomach, soon after taking a drink, [24] . ► Pressure in the stomach (first day), [22] . ► Pressure in the stomach, as from indigestion, the whole day, [7] . ► Pressure in the stomach after a light dinner, as if it were overloaded with food; with a sensation as if this pressure extended upward to the fauces, lasting during the rest of the day until going to sleep, [8] . ► Pressure in the stomach, as after drinking mineral water; for several moments I thought I would vomit, then the stomach became glowing hot, which was frequently repeated for several hours, followed by a sensation as though I had drank too much water, which lasted the whole forenoon (first day), [22] . ► Pinching pressure in the stomach, [3c] . ► Pressive painful sensation in the epigastric region, [1] . [400.] ► Sticking pain in the pit of the stomach, on every inspiration, which, however, completely disappeared on expiration, [6] . ► Violent sticking pain in stomach, on lying down in the afternoon, so severe that it brought tears, at last was obliged to sit, and remained sitting until overpowered by sleep (second day), [22] . ► Two dull stitches in quick succession, first in the fundus of the stomach, then in the cæcal region (first day), [15] . ► Sensitiveness of the pit of the stomach to pressure (fourth day), [15] . ► Sensitiveness of the epigastric region, especially the pit of the stomach, to pressure, [17] . ► Sensitiveness of the pit of the stomach and the whole abdomen to pressure (eighth day), [16] . ► Great sensitiveness to pressure in the pit of the stomach, afterwards extending over the whole abdomen, [18] . ► Epigastric region painful to touch, [9] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Coc-c.

rectum.text:
RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Rectum. ► Burning pain in the rectum, following the stool (first day), [20] . ► Sticking in the rectum, [30] . ► Sticking pains in the rectum with every stool, for several days, much worse on the ninth day, with great exertion to stool, when it lasted several hours, always aggravated on walking (ninth day), [22] . [460.] ► Violent jerking and boring stitches in the rectum, constantly jumping to the neck of the bladder and along the ureters to the kidneys, and at last disappearing (fifth day), [20] . ► Anus. ► Much secretion of moisture in the fissure between the nates and anus, [24] . ► Slight burning in the anus, [24] . ► Severe twinges in the anus, after moderate exercise, [24] . ► Slight crawling in the anus, [24] . ► Rather severe itching in the anus, [12] . ► Urging. ► Urging to stool, followed by hard fæces, [17] . ► Urging to stool, frequently ineffectual, [30] . ► Frequent urging to stool, without result (fourth day), [16] . ► Frequent ineffectual urging to stool, followed by three evacuations, relieving the pains in the lumbar and sacral regions (ninth day), [16] . [470.] ► Diarrha-like urging to stool, followed, however, only by a pasty-like evacuation, with much flatulence, [6] .
STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Some diarrha, [19] . ► Three soft stools mingled with hard lumps, during the day, [9] . ► Two soft stools, in quick succession, on the third day, soon after taking the drug, [12] . ► Soft stool, preceded by griping about the umbilicus, at 11 A.M., twice repeated in the afternoon (third day), [10] . ► Very copious soft stool (seventh day), [15] . ► Copious stools after walking (fourth day), [16] . ► Daily copious pasty stool (unusual), [3b] . ► Very profuse, pasty, not offensive evacuation, with much flatulence and decided relief, an hour after eating (follows constipation for a week), (eleventh day), [11] . ► Stool, with straining, with slight burning and protrusion of the hæmorrhoids, consisting of fæces enveloped in mucus (first and second day), [14] . [480.] ► Stool with straining, fæces gluey; stool followed by spasmodic, exceedingly troublesome pain in the rectum, just at the lower end of the sacrum, for a short time, [12] . ► Stool irregular, throughout the whole proving, [1] . ► Stool normal, first and second days; hard, third day; much pasty stool, fourth day; one normal, another thin, after four hours, fifth day; an unsatisfactory hard stool in the afternoon, sixth day; the same, seventh day; no stool, eighth day; very copious pasty stool, ninth day; scanty hard stool, tenth day; no stool, eleventh day; the stools before the proving were very irregular, sometimes hard, sometimes thin pasty; (normally they occurred twice a day), [29] . ► Constipation. ► Hard dry stool (fifth day), [11] . ► Hard unsatisfactory stool, the first after six days (eleventh day), [11] . ► Stool delayed from 8 A.M. to 2 P.M. (first day), [12] . ► No stool (third and fourth day), [11] .

urinary.text: URINARY ORGANS. ► Kidneys and Bladder. ► Very painful sensation in the region of the kidneys and bladder (eighth day), [29] . ► Drawing pain beginning in the right kidney and extending along the ureter to the bladder, at 5 A.M., waking him from sleep, [13] . ► Dull pressive pain in both kidneys, especially in the right, which was particularly noticed on pressure, or on moving the upper part of the body, during the day, disappearing towards evening; the next day it returned more severe than ever and extended to the bladder, relieved by frequent passage of flatus, [13] . [490.] ► Almost incessant sensation of soreness in the region of both kidneys, which gradually extended to the bladder, especially into the sphincter, accompanied by frequent urging to urinate, and increased secretion of dark urine, [2] . ► Much painful drawing in the region of the left ureter (seventh day), [29] . ► Pain in the region of the bladder, with ineffectual urging to urinate, waking him from sleep in the night (seventh day), [29] . ► Sensation of tension and fulness in the bladder, without leading to micturition; this tension remained even after micturition, [5] . ► Cramp, heat, and coldness constantly alternating in the region of the urinary bladder (fourth day), [22] . ► Pressure on the bladder (tenth day), [29] . ► Severe pressure in the bladder, and constant urging to urinate, relieved after micturition (seventh day), [29] . ► Repeated attacks of severe pressure on the bladder; cutting pain in the hypochondriac region, whereby he became very hot in the face (sixth day), [29] . ► Sensation of pressure and heaviness in the bladder, especially in the forepart towards the urethra, with constant urging to urinate and frequent discharge, of normal color, slightly acid in the forenoon (soon after taking), [3] . ► Very violent twisting pain in the neck of the bladder, lasting a quarter of an hour, not relieved by micturition nor by passage of flatus, [23] . [500.] ► Severe, long-drawn stitch, extending from the kidney along the ureters to the bladder (twelfth night), [20] . ► Urethra. ► Pain in the urethra on urinating, as from an obstruction, [13] . ► Burning in the urethra, during the passage of urine (eighth day), [29] . ► Slight burning in the urethra, while urinating, [24] . ► Pain in the urethra on urinating, violent, burning, with a sensation as though there were a small stone in the urethra, [13] . ► Excessive burning along the urethra, with at times almost intolerable prickling at its orifice; after urinating the burning and tickling disappeared, but the latter occurred during the day previous to much micturition (third day), [11] . ► Stitches and constant dull pain in the urethra, in the region of the navicular fossa, [13] . ► Transient stitches in the urethra, in the forepart of the glans penis, at 11 P.M. (second day), [3] . ► Stinging and tickling at the orifice of the urethra, [30] . ► Very slight tickling in the forepart of the urethra twice before urinating, as if dull needles were suddenly forced into it (fifth day), [11] . [510.] ► Itching and biting at the orifice of the urethra, so that he was obliged to rub it (first evening), [14] . ► Itching in the orifice of the urethra (eleventh day), [11] . ► Violent itching in the orifice of the urethra (fifth day), [29] . ► Violent itching at the orifice of the urethra, in the evening (fifth day), [29] . ► Very violent jerking and dull sticking pain in the forepart of the urethra, especially in the glans penis, which caused loud complaints, lasting a minute and a half, [3] . ► Urging to urinate, [30] . ► Urging to urinate, immediately after taking, [23] . ► Frequent urging to urinate, [21] . ► Frequent urging to urinate throughout the night, without result (third day), [29] . ► Frequent urging to urinate, with passage of urine clear as water, [3] . [520.] ► Frequent sudden urging to urinate, [13] . ► Great urging to urinate, in the morning, [5] . ► Very great urging to urinate, although he was obliged to wait a long time before the urine passed (eighth day), [29] . ► Twice awakened by desire to urinate, which was only accomplished after long waiting and much exertion, [13] . ► Irresistible desire to urinate, [13] . ► Micturition. ► Frequent micturition, [3b] ; (ninth day), [22] . ► Frequent micturition, nearly every hour, in the afternoon, [23] . ► Frequent micturition, especially disturbing him at midnight, and 4 A.M. (first night), [14] . ► More frequent micturition (third day), [11] . ► Frequent urination (ninth day), [22] . [530.] ► Frequent evacuation of saturated urine (first, second, and other days), [20] . ► Evacuation of pale odorless urine, almost every hour (first day), [14] . ► Frequent passage of large quantities of urine, the whole day, [3b] . ► Frequent passage of watery urine, which seems heavy and as thick as oil, [3c] . ► Frequent copious discharge of pale-yellow urine (secondary), [23] . ► Increased secretion of urine (sixth day), [15] . ► Urine profuse, [13] . ► Copious evacuation of urine as clear as water, followed in the afternoon by discharge of dark-colored urine, with much sticking along the urethra, especially near the glans penis, lasting several minutes, [3] . ► The amount of urine passed was greater than the amount of water taken, [13] . ► Micturition seldom (second day), [14] . [540.] ► Micturition more seldom than usual (fourth day), [11] . ► The frequency of micturition was diminished in spite of frequent urging to urinate; ordinarily urine was passed eight times a day, but during the proving only six times, [29] . ► Diminished secretion of urine, [23] . ► The quantity of urine during the proving was diminished, indeed soon after taking 15 to 20 drops in a day and a half; the diminution remained the same, even with the largest doses, from 100 to 400 drops and more in one day; (fourth day) there was relative increase in the quantity of urine (45 ounces); the diminution amounted to half the normal quantity, [29] . ► Urine scanty, dark-colored, very ammoniacal and very concentrated (second day), [14] . ► Very scanty secretion of urine through the night, [24] . ► Retention of urine until there is excessive urging, when it is passed very slowly and painfully; sometimes there is also sticking-jerking on urinating, extending into the sore pudenda (fourth day), [22] . ► Waiting a long time for the stream of urine (tenth day), [29] . ► Slight strangury, in the evening, [26] . ► Urine. ► Urine yellow and turbid (fourth day), [11] . [550.] ► The color of urine was at first straw-yellow, on the third day it became lemon-yellow, on the sixth light-brown, then brownish-red, and finally red, [29] . ► Urine red, scanty (fifth night), [10] . ► Urine thinner than usual and hot, at 9 P.M. (second day), [3] . ► Urine acid, always causing burning (fifth day), [22] . ► The urine was acid, much more so than normal (this acid reaction seemed to depend upon the Coccus acid), [29] . ► Urine turbid, cloudy, [20] . ► The freshly voided urine was always clear, and would stand several hours and even three or four days, without becoming turbid; on the fourth day it would become turbid after one to three hours; on the sixth day it began to decompose in half an hour, [29] . ► The first traces of mucus in the urine were seen on the fourth day, forming in part flakes, clouds, and threads, mixed largely with the sediment, [29] . ► Urine deposits a brick-red sediment (which on shaking the vessel mixes easily with the fluid), [28] . ► Brick-red sand deposits after the urine has stood a long time, [7] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. [560.] ► Erections towards morning, greater than usual, [12] . ► Frequent erections (third day), [29] . ► Frequent erections at night, also during the day, [29] . ► Fine itching stitches here and there in the glans penis, then in the scalp, or in the skin of the abdomen, [20] . ► Dull throbbing in the glans penis, with tickling in the urethra (third day), [20] . ► Itching in the glans penis (tenth day), [29] . ► Much itching on the glans penis (tenth day), [29] . ► Drawing sticking in the right testicle, extending into the inguinal region, very transient, [3] . ► Night tormented by great sexual desire and voluptuous dreams, [13] . ► Sexual desire much excited on waking (eighth day), [11] . [570.] ► Very great sexual desire, [23] . ► Extreme excitement of sexual desire, [13] . ► Sexual excitement, first four days, [14] . ► Great sexual excitement (towards the end of the proving), [24] . ► Lasciviousness, with lascivious actions, without erections, in the morning, [5] . ► Great lasciviousness, in the morning, with erections, [5] . ► Lascivious mood, [3] . ► Emissions, at 5 A.M., [23] . ► Emission, with diminished sexual desire at night (sixth day), [15] . ► Emission at night, without dreams, [20] . [A very rare occurrence, not noticed since my last sulphur proving.] ► Female. [580.] ► Great swelling of the pudenda, especially towards the front; they are very sensitive; it seems as though there were a swelling in these parts, for the orifice of the urethra seems so contracted that the urine flows slowly over the sore parts, often with very severe burning; frequent discharge of fluid which is very painful; it, however, does not seem to be leucorrha, since the discharge is very thin (first day), [22] . ► The swelling in the pudenda increased, became hard and hot (second day), [22] . ► The swelling of the labia, with the urinary troubles, lasted eight days, and gradually disappeared, [22] . ► Discharge of mucus from the vagina, preceded by drawing-dragging pain in the inguinal, hypochondriac, and pubic regions, [17] . ► Sensation as though the pudenda were swollen, as I believe they were (seventh day), [22] . ► Sudden burning and throbbing in the pudenda, with great sensitiveness, [22] . ► Shooting pain, like electric shocks, in the pudenda (first day), [22] . ► Menstruation three days too early, more profuse than usual, black and thick, [17] . ► Menstruration three days too early, lasting too long, with unusual sensation towards the close (which usually occurred at the beginning), a tensive constriction in the abdomen, rising up towards the stomach as though I should vomit water, [22] . ► Menstruation seven days too early, black and thick, [18] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Coc-c.

chest.text: CHEST. ► Increased vigor of the thoracic organ, [27] . ► Sneezing was impossible on account of the violent pain in the lung, [22] . ► Sensation of heat deep in the chest, which became so severe momentarily that it caused burning, especially in the præcordial region, [9] . ► A suffocative sensation, as though the thorax were too narrow; this symptom was aggravated by drinking beer (seventh and eighth days), [10] . ► Pressure upon the chest, with hoarseness, [2] . [690.] ► Severe pressure in the chest in the evening, followed by ulcerative pain in the præcordial region, [20] . ► Frequent dull sticking pressure in the region of the bend of the fifth and sixth ribs (first day), [20] . ► Sensation of pressure, weakness, and bruisedness of the chest, [3b] . ► Pressive sensation in the chest, with at times increased sensitiveness about the left nipple, [2] . ► Pinching-pressive pain in the middle of the chest, [3b] . ► Oppression of the chest, [3b] , [24] . ► Oppression, with soreness of the whole external chest (fourth day), [20] . ► Oppression of the chest and soreness of the apices of the lungs on ascending a hill, a sensation as if he had run too violently, [10b] . ► Some oppression of the chest, in the forenoon while speaking, [24] . ► Frequent oppression of the chest, [21] . [700.] ► Transient oppression of the chest (eighth day), [16] . ► Sticking in the lower part of the chest, [3] . ► Transient sticking pain in the ribs and præcordial region, in a place of the size of a dollar, which on pressure feels as if suppurating, [6] . ► Stitches in the upper part of the chest, [20] . ► Fine stitches in the walls of the thorax, especially in the epigastric region, on uncovering the abdomen, [3b] . ► Sensation of soreness in the apices of both lungs, with transient chilliness in spite of very warm temperature, when walking (first day), [10] . ► Sore pain in the chest beneath the clavicles, with much affection of the air-passages, [13] . ► Sore pain in the lungs became at times dull sticking or slightly boring, and sometimes seated in the pleura and pericardium; at another time it seemed deep in the lungs and heart, and at the same time seemed to be associated with stronger beats of the heart (second day), [10] . ► Very sore pain, with pressure and tension in the chest and pulsating throbbing, especially in the apices of the lungs, following the sensation of heat (second day), [10] . ► The symptoms in the chest became gradually worse, the sore pain became burning, and frequently changed its seat, but it affected most the heart and apices of the lungs, with irritation to breathe deeply and to cough (second day), [10] . [710.] ► Frequent sensation as though a vessel were pulsating here and there in the lungs (first day), [10] . ► Front. ► Burning beneath the sternum, [24] . ► Painful pressure in the middle of the sternum, extending from before backward, coincident with a similar pain between the shoulder-blades, extending from behind forward, in the forenoon while walking (second day), [20] . ► Sensation of pressure in the middle of the sternum, extending to both scapulæ (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Feeling as if the lungs were affected by fine stitches behind the middle of the sternum, [3b] . ► Sensation of soreness and pressure beneath the sternum, [24] . ► Sides. ► Slight burning and sticking between the ribs, first left, then right (fourth day), [16] . ► Tensive pain in the upper part of the left chest (first day), [20] . ► Tensive pain in the upper part of the left chest near the clavicle, especially noticed during the day, and aggravated by moving the left arm (eighth and ninth days), [20] . ► Drawing pain in the region of the left clavicle, aggravated by lying upon the left shoulder, [6] . [720.] ► Sticking, not very painful, in a small circumscribed spot in the middle of the first false rib of the left side, after going into the street, ceasing when quiet in the room, [3] . ► Sticking pain in the left side, extending forward towards the sternum, with pressive pain on the chest, [4] . ► Sticking pain in the left side of the chest, in a circumscribed spot, aggravated by walking, but not by deep breathing, [3] . ► Pressive sticking pain in the lower portion of the right lung, immediately after rising in the morning; the pain was very severe, especially on deep inspiration, but was not affected by motion, [23] . ► Stitches in the left half of the chest, especially on rapid walking, [20] . ► Stitches in the left upper half of the chest, aggravated towards evening, [21] . ► Stitches in rapid succession in the region of the left nipple, which disappear on paying attention to them, and do not return (fourth day), [2] . ► Stitches in quick succession at the greatest curvature of the last true ribs of the left side (60th dil., second day, also second day after 30th dil.); they appeared while sewing and were aggravated by walking or ascending steps, but not by deep breathing; relieved during rest, [4] . ► Some stitches in quick succession in the lower left side of the thorax, in the forenoon when walking in the street, also returning in the evening (second day), [3] . ► Transient, very painful stitches, at times in the left, at times in the right side of the chest, [27] . [730.] ► Very transient stitches between the sixth and seventh ribs, first in the left and then in the right side (sixth day), [15] . ► Dull stitch in the lower lobe of the right lung, on deep inspiration, at 4 P.M., [23] . ► Fine stitches in the right half of the chest along the sternum, [21] . ► Frequent fine stitches between the fifth and seventh left ribs, disappearing on deep inspiration, and immediately returning on expiration (third day), [16] . ► Deeply piercing sharp stitches in the upper part of the left chest near the clavicle, followed by long-continued ulcerative pains, frequently repeated for several days, and seeming similar to a commencing tuberculosis (third day), [20] . ► Severe piercing stitches near the left nipple, [20] . ► Several biting stitches on the margin of the left false ribs between the stomach and left flank (deeply seated), [7] . ► Sensation of soreness at the apex of the left lung, with at times pulsating sensation that constantly alternated with slight contraction of the lower lip (like cramp in the skin), [9] . ► Bruised pain in the region of the left clavicle, which pains as if sprained, on moving the head or left arm, or when lying on the left shoulder, [6] . ► Bruised pain in the region of the left clavicle, aggravated by moving the arm, and changing while lying to a pain in the left shoulder, as if sprained, [6] . [740.] ► Bruised pain in the left clavicular region, on waking from sleep in the morning, [6] .

heart.text: HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► An indefinite pain in the heart, which was not seldom interrupted by the beating of the pulse; sensation as if everything were forced towards the heart; towards evening of the same day throbbing pain in the heart, with at times pulsations on its upper surface, [9] . ► Pressure in the præcordial region, [13] . ► Pressive burrowing pain in the region of the heart, on rising, continuing the whole time he was driving, and only disappearing on leaving the carriage, [13] . ► Severe pressive pain in the præcordial region, with palpitation, at night, [13] . ► Dull stitches through the heart from time to time, with throbbing in it, which seemed to be audible, but was not perceptible to the hand (third morning), [10] . ► Constant sensation of soreness in the heart from morning till noon (sixth day), [10] . ► Throbbing, like a violent pulsation, now in the heart, in the middle of the chest, now in the apices of the lungs; throbbing, consisting of several beats in rapid succession, followed by five to ten minutes' intermission until it appeared at another place (first day), [10] . ► Sensation as though an artery were pulsating very rapidly on the upper surface of the heart, repeated several times while walking, [9] . ► Heart's Action. ► Tumultuous action of the heart, while lying down after dinner (first day), [14] . [750.] ► Palpitation, causing anxiety, lasting several minutes (second day), [16] . ► Frequent palpitation at night, waking him from sleep, [13] . ► Sudden violent palpitation, as from great fright, lasting twenty to thirty seconds, whereby the whole body was shaken, waking him about midnight from doze, and recurring with constantly decreasing severity, [7] . ► *Irregular beating of the heart in rapid succession, causing anxiety, after eating , [6] . ► Pulse. ► Pulse accelerated, [76] ; (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Pulse accelerated, tremulous (first day), [14] . ► Pulse moderately accelerated, [23] . ► Pulse 64 (fifth day after 3d trit.), [4] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Coc-c.

extremities.text: EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Weakness and tearing in the limbs (first day), [22] . ► Prostration of the limbs, [5] . ► Sensation of weakness in all the limbs, in the morning after rising (third day after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Slight drawing in the left shoulder, which gradually became a heaviness, and in the evening changed to a kind of painful lameness, as after taking cold in a draft of air when heated (second day), [14] . ► Tensive-pressive pain, now in the left shoulder, now in the finger-joints of the left hand, and in the right hip, never very definite, but frequently repeated till evening, when it quite disappeared (second day), [10] . ► Fine stitches, as from splinters of glass, now in the nail of the left great toe, now in the tips of the fingers and beneath the nails of the thumb and index finger of the right hand, [6] . [800.] ► Tearings here and there in the long bones, [24] . ► Slight tearing in the knee and elbow-joints, [2] .

upper_extremities.text: SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Shoulder. ► Pain in the shoulder, much relieved by lying on the painful part and pressing it firmly against the bed (second night), [14] . ► Heaviness like a pressure on the right shoulder, extending down the back to the region of the kidneys (first day), [14] . ► Peculiar tensive heaviness across the shoulder and lower portion of the back of the neck (third day), [14] . ► Tension, drawing, and tearing in the right shoulder (seventh day), [15] . ► Drawing and tearing in the right shoulder, extending to the forearm and index finger (fourth day), [16] . ► Tearing pain in the right shoulder and small of back, which, in the evening, extended to the forearm, and at times became very violent, [15] . ► Arm. ► Obstinate drawing in the right deltoid muscle, making motion of the upper arm, especially raising it, difficult, [23] . ► Dull sticking pressure in the middle of the right upper arm (first night), [20] . [810.] ► Violent tearing pain extending from the right scapula across the outer surface of the right upper arm, [6] . ► Drawing-tearing pain in the anterior surface of the muscles of the right upper arm, during rest, [6] . ► Transient sticking-tearing pain in the fleshy portion of the anterior and inner surface of the left upper arm, [6] . ► A kind of burning drawing in the condyles and joint of the left elbow, after waking in the night, and preventing his going to sleep for a long time (first night), [14] . ► Violent pressive pain near the left elbow, [6] . ► Sticking pain in the muscles at the bend of the right elbow, when at rest, [7] . ► Severe stitch in the tip of the left elbow, [7] . ► Violent stitch, as from a leech, in the bend of the left elbow, [7] . ► Forearm. ► Drawing pain in the muscles of the right forearm, [6] . ► Transient tearing in the tendinous expansion of both forearms, followed by some pain in both lower legs, [24] . ► Wrist. [820.] ► Paralytic pain in the right wrist, [23] . ► Hand. ► Biting-sticking on the back of the right hand, [6] . ► Fingers. ► The left thumb became swollen and it was difficult to move it, every motion of it or pressure upon it was extremely painful, [8] . ► Sticking alternately in the tips of the fingers, in the temples, and soles of the feet (fourth day), [22] . ► Transient tearing pains in the little finger of the right hand, especially on moving it, also of the left great toe, [9] .

lower_extremities.text: INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► General lassitude and weariness of the lower limbs, especially noticed in the cars (first day), [14] . ► Great exhaustion of the lower limbs (first day), [14] . ► Frequent waking at night, with lameness of both legs and of the left shoulder (first day), [20] . ► Painfulness of the whole right leg, [24] . ► Aching in both legs, along the course of the large vessels and nerves, [1] . ► Hip. [830.] ► Drawing-sticking pain, extending from the left flank along the left hip, lasting several seconds, [6] . ► Thigh. ► Aching in the thighs, as after a long walk (ninth day), [14] . ► Sudden drawing in the anterior portion of the right thigh above the knee, also in the right great toe and left thumb, [23] . ► Transient drawing pain on the upper and right great toe and left thigh (during rest), [7] . ► Tearing-sticking pain in the left sciatic nerve extending from the left gluteal muscles to the outer and posterior surface of the thigh, during rest, [7] . ► Tearing stitches in the anterior inner muscles of the thigh, [7] . ► Transient tearing pain along the anterior inner surface of the right thigh, afterwards a similar pain in the outer side of the right upper arm, followed by painful drawing in the metacarpal bone of the right thumb, and several fine stitches in the right inner malleolus, [6] . ► Bruised pain in the thigh behind the great trochanter, disappearing when walking, [12] . ► Knee. ► Pressive pain in the left patella to the side, [6] . [840.] ► Pain in the right patella, during a long walk, especially marked in its inner margin, and so much aggravated by motion and pressure that, in the evening, walking was impossible; in the night, both knees and toes were swollen and hot to touch, the pain was pressive and prevented any motion, he was obliged to go to bed; this gradually disappeared during the next three days, [8] . ► Sticking and tearing in the knee (first day), [22] . ► Sudden sticking-tensive pain in the bend of the right knee, in the afternoon while walking, so that he could not stretch out the foot, and could scarcely walk for several minutes (second day), [20] . ► Stitching in the margin of the left patella, as from an electric spark, [6] . ► Severe stitch in the right patella, [7] . ► Severe stitch in the right patella, as from an electric spark, in the evening, [6] . ► Deeply piercing stitches in the hollow of the knee, extending along the course of the left tendo Achillis to the back of the right foot, [20] . ► Leg. ► Sensation of weakness in both legs, in the evening (first day), [20] . ► Pain extending upward and downward in the lower half of the left tibia, while sitting, frequently in the afternoon (third day), [2] . ► Burning in the legs, [24] . [850.] ► Severe burning and itching in the right leg, [24] . ► Drawing spasmodic pain in the right calf; this pain, together with a similar one in the shoulder, foot, etc., frequently returned with more or less severity, [1] . ► Frequent spasmodic drawings in the right calf, [1] . ► Slight drawing-pressive pain in the left tendo Achillis, only when walking, and then noticed when stretching out the foot; touch of the painful part (about an inch above the insertion of the tendon into the os calcis) showed no morbid change, the tendon could be pressed or pulled here and there, or stretched without pain; when the foot was quiet in any position, the pain immediately disappeared, but returned on walking, and then only on stretching out the foot (twentieth day), [11] . ► Very transient stitches in the right lower leg, towards the ankle, after eating, [24] . ► Tearing stitches along the muscles of the right calf, frequently repeated, [7] . ► Frequently returning throbbing stitches in both lower legs, [20] . ► Sticking-tearing pains on the inner side of the right tibia, rather severe, [24] . ► Sensation of soreness on the right tibia, [24] . ► Scraping pain in the tibiæ and in the elbows, [24] . [860.] ► The pain in the tendo Achillis did not appear through the whole night, was only slightly felt on walking about the room; walking in the street was very difficult, so that he limped; he was obliged to turn the foot outward, frequently stop and hold it up in order to moderate the pain, was only able to walk slowly and with short steps; the next day the pain continued so that he was unable to go out; pressure upon the tendon was somewhat sensitive; ascending steps was especially painful; the following day the pain became somewhat less; after this it gradually improved until the twenty-seventh day, when he noticed very decided cracking in the tendon on moving the foot up and down; it seemed as though the tendons were dry; he was unable to stretch out the foot completely, and walking for some time caused pain; the trouble lasted some days and gradually disappeared, [11] . ► Ankle. ► Severe stitches in the inner malleolus of the left foot, [6] . ► Pain as after a bruise on the malleoli, and on the inner surface of the heel, on bending the foot (fourth day), [16] . ► Foot. ► Great weariness of the feet, in the evening, after a short walk, [24] . ► Excessive weariness in the feet, especially troublesome so long as he was sitting quietly in the room, but disappearing immediately on going out, [23] . ► Forepart of the left foot became somewhat painful on walking; it seemed as though the mobility of the joints were impeded by the swelling of the articular surface, [9] . ► Burning in the soles of the feet, [24] . ► The soles of the feet are painful, especially the forepart, even after a moderate walk, lasting several days; the pain is for the most part burning; after sitting a short time it becomes a sensation of heat and gradually disappears, [24] . ► Fine stitches in the sole of the felt foot, near the toes, [6] . ► Toes. ► Cramp in the right toes, [1] . [870.] ► Violent cramp in the three last toes of the right foot, lasting several seconds, on lying down at night, [1] . ► Pressive pain, swelling, and redness of the great toes; this prevented walking, and seemed almost like gouty inflammation, lasting four days, but not very violent (nineteenth day), [10] . ► Pressive pain in the left great toe, which became worse, so that by evening he could not step upon that foot; he became chilly, which continued some time after going to bed, [8] . ► Slight sticking, as from a splinter of glass, beneath the nail of the left great toe, at 4 A.M., [7] . ► Fine sticking as from splinters of glass, on the lower surface and in the tip of the left great toe, [6] . ► Severe pain in a corn on the right little toe, so that he limped while walking, [24] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Objective. ► General excitement on waking in the morning; the pulses beat so violently that it seems as though he himself hears them, [8] . ► General mental and physical excitement first four days, followed by a half-stupid condition, [14] . ► Great indolence (fifth day), [11] . ► Disinclined to all exertion, indolent, exhausted and tired, but to-day not ill-humored (ninth day), [11] . [880.] ► Disinclination to rise, and after rising weariness and lassitude (second day), [14] . ► Great weakness, so that it was impossible to take the usual morning walk (first day), [22] . ► Great weakness and sleepiness, in the morning, [5] . ► Prostration, [19] . ► Prostration of the whole body, [7] . ► An attack of uneasiness; even in bad weather he was forced to go into the open air, while usually he preferred to be quiet, [5] . ► Subjective. ► Weariness, prostration, and fretful mood, with great irritability after a short nap after dinner, [13] . ► Great weariness the whole afternoon (seventh day), [29] . ► Great weariness the whole afternoon, without cause (seventh day), [29] . ► Great weariness, with yawning, in the evening (sixth day), [29] . [890.] ► Great weariness and much yawning (sixth day), [29] . ► Sensation of weariness (first day), [20] . ► Fulness and heaviness of the whole body, as if he were stuffed (first day), [14] . ► Sensation as if the whole body were swollen while half awake at night; it seems as if his body were adherent to a woollen sack; everything that he touched seemed to be thicker than natural, [5] . ► Sudden sensation, as though something were distending within me, together with a severe sticking, apparently in the rectum (?); after the sensation of distension increased, warmth extended over the whole abdomen (ninth day), [22] . ► Drawings and tearings, here and there in the body, especially in the neck, between the shoulders and in the forearms, [24] . ► Painful tensive-pressive sensation in the bones, just above and behind the left ear, especially in the mastoid process, coincident with accumulation of tasteless saliva in the mouth, [7] . ► Sticking-tearing pains, here and there in the muscles, especially violent in the right hip-joint; often intolerable on rising or on sudden motion, [1] . ► Tearing or drawing sticking as from splinters, especially in the warm bed, in the evening and at night when at rest, sometimes from slight exertion of certain muscles, as for example, holding a book in the hand caused them in the upper arm, [7] . ► Frequent biting stitches in various places in the body, in the scalp, concha, right side of the neck and throat, on the margin of both rami of the lower jaw, near the nipples, in the back, pit of the stomach, axillæ, bends of the thighs (inguinal region); all of which symptoms were completely relieved as soon as he left the warm bed, [6] . [900.] ► The action of the drug was so persistent, that on the twenty-eighth day he took Lachesis as an antidote, [11] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Coc-c.

sleep.text: SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Indication to yawn and stretch the limbs, with tensive pain in the small of the back, [5] . ► Great sleepiness during the day, [5] . ► Great sleepiness in the afternoon (seventh day), [22] . ► Increased sleepiness after eating, so that he could scarcely keep awake, followed by general prostration, [13] . ► Irresistible desire to sleep, [13] . ► Sound sleep the first part of the night, but on waking in the morning the mucous membrane of the mouth and throat was dry and the tongue stiff, with sensation of heat in it, relieved by cold water, [5] . ► Constant groaning during sleep (first night), [24] . ► Sleeplessness. [940.] ► Sleep uneasy on account of previous vexations, [5] . ► Sleep uneasy and disturbed by pains, [29] . ► Sleep uneasy, interrupted by dry cough, [5] . ► Uneasy sleep, with excited sexual desire, though without complete erections, [5] . ► Sleep was uneasy, frequently interrupted by cough, pressive throbbing headache, and pulsating throbbing in the heart (third night), [10] . ► Sleep only after midnight, very restless and light, so that he was awakened by the slightest noise, with palpitation as from fright, [7] . ► Restless night (fifth night), [22] . ► Night restless; he could not sleep on account of internal heat, [9] . ► Night restless; sleep frequently interrupted (third night after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Night restless, especially disturbed by audible noises in the intestines, worse while lying on the right side (first night), [14] . [950.] ► Night extremely restless; no sleep, [5] . ► Frequent waking at night, with general excitement, as after strong coffee, [8] . ► Dreams. ► Sleep interrupted by dreams, [12] . ► Sleep with many dreams of many people, and full of care, [12] . ► Affectionate dreams, with reminiscences of my youthful loves, [3c] . ► Vivid dreams at night, [6] . ► Vivid dreams at night (first night), [20] . ► Vivid dream at night, [12] . ► Sleep disturbed by vivid dreams, [23] . ► Night disturbed by vivid fretful dreams, [6] .

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. [960.] ► Chilliness of the whole body, especially of the back, [13] . ► Chilliness, more or less, throughout the day, [23] . ► Chilliness throughout the day; she does not feel the heat although the thermometer stood at 31° (C.), (after 3d trit.), [4] . ► Chilliness always coming on in the afternoon and lasting till into the night, with slight general weakness and heaviness of the limbs, [14] . ["Possibly to be ascribed to the damp cold weather."] ► Chilliness the whole afternoon (third day), [10] . ► Chilliness between 3 and 5 P.M., [23] . ► Chilliness in the evening, [5] . ► Chilliness after dinner, lasting a few hours, [23] . ► Chilliness all over, on going to bed, especially in the back, with thirst; the accustomed bed coverings seemed too cool for him; after half an hour dry heat of the head, with red face, while the rest of the body was chilly; after a while this dry heat became general and lasted till midnight, when sweat broke out, but only on the upper part of the body, which lasted till 5 A.M. (third night), [10] . ► Chilliness, immediately relieved in the open air, [23] . [970.] ► Constant chilliness, with increased thirst, in the afternoon; in the evening, chilliness, with dull throbbing in the heart, and sensation of soreness within the chest (fifth day), [10] . ► Great chilliness the whole day (third day), [22] . ► Great chilliness, followed by headache and coughing, from a sensation of rawness in the air-passages, while lying, at 10 A.M. (third day), [10] . ► Evening chill over the whole body (after 3d dec. trit.), [4] . ► Shaking chill, with heat of the head, before going to sleep, lasting half an hour, followed by general dry heat and sweat, which lasted the whole night, and brought relief (fifth night), [10] . ► Shivering over the whole body, at 9 P.M., lasting half an hour; pulse 100, [23] . ► Transient attacks of shivering over the whole body, [12] . ► Feeling of coldness, without chilliness (second day), [10] . ► Unusual sensation of coldness, without chilliness (soon after 50 drops, second day), [10] . ► Chilliness through all the limbs, immediately, [22] . [980.] ► Uneasy dozing at night, from which he was frequently awakened by chilliness in the thighs (first night), [14] . ["This symptom may have been caused by increased coldness during the night."] ► Creeping chills along the spine, [1] . ► Shivering across the scapula, extending down the arm, with sensation as if the skin would be loosened from the flesh; repeated several times, but disappearing on moving in the open air, after dinner, [12] . ► Coldness of the stomach, with a sensation as if cold air were blowing in it (fifth day), [15] . ► Coldness of the feet, with perspiration of the upper half of the body, in the morning, [23] . ► Sensation of coldness in the occiput, as though he were in a draft, [5] . ► Sensation of coldness and discomfort in the stomach, [24] . ► Frequently recurring cold sensation in the skin, on the right shoulder, and across the back, [1] . ► Peculiar cooling sensation, extending up the sophagus of the mouth (first day), [14] . ► Heat. ► Increased warmth of the body (first day), [14] . [990.] ► General heat over the whole body, followed by slight perspiration (first night), [20] . ► Dry, heat, with uneasiness, at 3 A.M., [23] . ► Sensation of heat, as though it spread through the whole body, in the evening, in bed, [9] . ► General sensation of heat, in the evening, in bed, [8] . ► Greatly overpowered by moderate heat, [24] . ► On entering an ordinarily warm room the temperature seemed intolerably hot, with confusion of the head, which increased till evening to a moderate headache, relieved in the open air, [3] . ► Slight febrile symptoms, towards evening, [5] . ► Heat in the head on the vertex, [9] . ► Heat in the cheeks, in the morning, on waking, [3] . ► Violent heat in the cheeks for half an hour, at 5 P.M. (second day), [3] . [1000.] ► Persistent heat and ringing in the left ear, [7] . ► Prickling heat in the cheeks, without redness (first evening), [14] . ► Sensation of heat in the chest, abdomen, and thighs; in the thighs it was associated with a prickling sensation, while walking (second day), [10] . ► Sensation of heat in the lungs, while walking, lasting half an hour, and suddenly disappearing; on the next day, a quarter of an hour after another dose, the same sensation, with a feeling as though the expired air was warmer than usual, [8] . ► Sensation of internal heat in the chest, especially severe in the præcordial region and in the lower half of the right side of the chest, [9] . ► Frequently increasing warmth in the stomach (first day), [22] . ► Sensation of increased warmth in the region of the stomach and ileum; it seems as though these parts were bathed in warm water (first day), [14] . ► Sensation of increased warmth in the whole abdomen, [9] . ► Feeling of unpleasant warmth in the glans penis and in the left testicle, [23] . ► Sweat. ► Profuse sweat, with great weakness, on rapid walking, [8] . [1010.] ► General profuse sweat (seventh day), [10] . ► General copious sweat, in the morning, [23] . ► Skin dry and hot; the heat is somewhat relieved in the morning by cold water, [5] . ► The back, sacral and coccygeal regions, covered with sweat, at night, [13] . ► Sweat on the right lower leg, [24] . ► Slight perspiration on the lower legs and feet, in the morning (second day), [14] . ► Dryness of the lips (seventh day), [20] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Confusion of head, etc.; on rising, confusion in forehead, etc.; on waking, dizzy confusion of the head; on waking, headache; after waking, headache; on waking, headache above right eye; soon after rising, pain in temporal region; on waking, pressure, etc.; in vertex; while lying in bed, headache in parietal bone; on waking, biting between eyeballs and lids; sensitiveness of teeth to cold water; after waking, worse on inspiring air, or holding a cigar with the teeth, toothache; on waking, pain in right molars; irritation in throat; burning in fauces; irritation in palate; thirst; nausea, etc.; on waking, sensation of nausea; on waking, retching, etc.; immediately after rising, distension in the stomach, etc.; on waking, griping in abdomen ; at 5 o'clock, pain beginning in right kidney; urging to urinate; at 4 o'clock, frequent micturition; on waking, sexual desire; lasciviousness, etc.; at 5 o'clock, emission; hoarseness; dry cough ; after waking, cough; at 6 o'clock, cough; after rising, short, etc.; cough; immediately after rising, especially on deep inspiration, pain in right lung; on waking, pain in clavicular region; on waking, tension in cervical muscles; after waking, pain in sacro-iliac region; after rising, sensation in limbs; weakness, etc.; on rising, itching of scrotum; coldness of feet, etc.; at 3 o'clock, dry heat, etc.; on waking, heat in cheeks; general sweat; perspiration on lower legs, etc. ► ( Forenoon ), Drawing in back teeth; while walking, stitches in left hypochondrium; especially from 10 to 11 o'clock, cough; cough; while speaking, oppression of chest; while walking, pressure in middle of sternum; at 10 o'clock, while lying, chilliness. ► ( Afternoon ), Towards evening, confusion of head; at 6 o'clock, in a warm room, pressure, etc., in occiput; the symptoms are most frequent and most violent; hawking of mucus; heartburn; lying down, pain in stomach; frequent micturition; towards evening, hoarseness; voice hoarse, etc.; towards evening, stitches in left chest; pain in loins, etc.; pain in small of back; while sitting quietly, pain in region of kidneys; while sitting, pain in tibia; weariness ; itching on legs, etc.; sleepiness; chilliness ; between 3 and 5 o'clock, chilliness; thirst; towards evening, febrile symptoms; at 5 o'clock, heat in cheeks. ► ( Evening ), Apprehensiveness; confusion of head, etc.; after walking, confusion of the head; pressive headache; after lying down, pain from eyebrow into forehead; difficulty in swallowing; great thirst ; eructations of air; itching at orifice of urethra; strangury; at 9 o'clock, urine thinner, etc.; irritation to cough; short hoarseness; cough; pressure upon chest; pain in the loins; in bed, pain in lumbar region; pain in small of back; sensation in lower legs; after a short walk, weariness of the feet; weariness, etc.; in warm bed, tearing, etc.; chilliness; on going to bed, chilliness; chill; at 9 o'clock, shivering; in bed, sensation of heat. ► ( Night ), Heartburn; at 11 o'clock, stitches in urethra; towards morning, erections; at 11.30 o'clock, tickling in larynx; dry cough ; cough; pain in præcordial region; palpitation; on lying down, cramp in toes; when at rest, tearing, etc.; sweat on back, etc. ► ( Before midnight ), When warm in bed, pain in mastoid process. ► ( Midnight ), Frequent micturition; sudden palpitation; sweat. ► ( After midnight ), Sleep restless, etc. ► ( Open air ), Lachrymation; after being in warm room, huskiness of voice. ► ( Ascending a height ), Oppression of chest, etc.; stitches at left ribs; pain in tendo Achillis. ► ( After beer ), Great excitement; temporary aggravation; pains in head, etc.; sensation in thorax. ► ( At breakfast ), Frontal headache. ► ( After breakfast ), Confusion of head. ► ( On the cars ), Lassitude in lower limbs. ► ( After coughing ), Nausea. ► ( After dinner ), Griping in abdomen; tumultuous action of heart; after short nap, weakness, etc.; chilliness; on moving in open air, shivering across scapulæ, etc. ► ( Driving ), Pain in region of heart. ► ( While eating ), Flatulence; pain in small of back. ► ( After eating ), Dizziness; thirst; distension of stomach; rumbling in intestines; griping in intestines; beating of the heart; stitches in lower leg; sleepiness. ► ( Heat of room ), Cough. ► ( On deep inspiration ), Stitch in right lung. ► ( Lying upon part ), Feeling in ear. ► ( Lying on left shoulder ), Pain in region of clavicle. ► ( Motion ), Pain in umbilicus; pains in little finger, etc.; pain in patella. ► ( Violent motion of part ), Dull headache. ► ( Moving head ), Pain in forehead. ► ( Moving arm ), Pain in region of left clavicle. ► ( Pressure ), Pain in flank; pain in patella. ► ( During rest ), Pain in sciatic nerve; weariness in feet. ► ( Smoking ), Pain in canine teeth; dry cough. ► ( Stepping hard ), Pressive headache. ► ( After stool ), Pain in rectum. ► ( After going into street ), Sticking in left false ribs. ► ( Empty swallowing ), Pressure in pharynx. ► ( Talking ), Sensation in soft palate. ► ( Turning head to right ), Pain in Eustachian tube. ► ( Uncovering abdomen ), Stitches in walls of thorax. ► ( Walking ), After smacking, heartburn; deep respiration; difficult respiration; soreness in apices of lungs; pains in rectum; copious stools; pain in left chest; stitches at left ribs; stitches in left thorax; sensation in heart; pain in tendo Achillis; pain in foot; sensation on surface of thigh; sensation of heart of chest, etc.; sensation of heat of lungs. ► ( Rapid walking ), Stitches in left chest; profuse sweat. ► ( Warmth ), Especially in bed, throat symptoms . ► ( In warm bed ), Stitches in various places; sticking in skin. ► ( In warm room ), After a walk, rush of blood to head; after being in cold air, itching within ear. ► ( Warmth of stove ), Cough. ► ( After wine ), Heartburn. ► Amelioration. ► ( Towards evening ), Became lively. ► ( Evening ), Cough. ► ( Night ), In warmth of bed, rawness, etc., in throat; cough. ► ( Open air ), Confusion of head; chilliness. ► ( On paying attention to the pain ), Stitches in left nipple disappear. ► ( Change of position ), When lying, pain in teeth, etc.; disappear. ► ( Cold water ), Cough. ► ( After washing with cold water ), Pain from temples towards vertex disappears. ► ( After dinner ), Scraping in throat. ► ( Passage of flatus ), Pain in flank; griping in abdomen. ► ( Lying down ), Headache, etc. ► ( Lying on painful part and pressing it firmly against bed ), Pain in shoulder. ► ( Micturition ), Pressure in bladder, etc. ► ( On pressure ), Pain in temporal region disappears. ► ( Rest ), Stitches in left ribs; pain in left tendo Achillis. ► ( On rising after short sleep ), Pressure on vertex disappears. ► ( Stool ), Griping in bowels. ► ( From Chinese tea ), Relief. ► ( When walking ), Pain in thighs disappears. ► ( Warmth ), Drawing in left hypochondrium. ► ( After warm soup ), Pain in Eustachian tube disappears. ► ( Water ), Pain in arches of palate. ► ( Wine ), Inclination to vomit.
